sections.title: CLTV should be calculated using the unpaid principal balance on all closed-end subordinate financing and the full amount of any HELOCs (whether or not funds have been drawn).

data.40 Amortization Term: If both ITIN and NPRA, apply only the ITIN LLPA.

sections.label: *Escrow Waiver LLPA will only be applied if taxes are not being escrowed
Tier 1 states: Texas, Louisiana, Georgia, South Carolina, North Carolina, Colorado, Arizona
Tier 2 States: Other (Other represents all states not listed in Tier 1 category with the exception of Florida).
The "Florida" LLPA is additive to all other LLPAs. A Florida condo loan will be priced using the "Condo/Coop" LLPA, the "Florida Condo" LLPA
For Expanded Prime Plus, Detached Condos are treated as Single Family Residence

Elite_Conv_SRP___With_Escrows: *With Escrows is defined as Taxes impounded
Elit_Conv_SRP___Without_Escrows: *Without Escrows is defined as Taxes not impounded
Elite_Govt_SRP: (1) Loan Amount buckets are based off of Total Loan Amount
Elite_DSCR_1_LLPAs: Price Cap (Assumes a 3-4 year prepayment penalty is charged. Reduce price cap -.50 for 2 year, -1.00 for 1 year and -1.50 for no prepayment penalty and increase price cap +.50 for 5 year prepayment penalty.)

Price Cap (Assumes a 3-4 year prepayment penalty is charged. Reduce price cap -.50 for 2 year, -1.00 for 1 year and -1.50 for no prepayment penalty and increase price cap +.50 for 5 year prepayment penalty.)
Elite_DSCR_5_LLPAs: CLTV should be calculated using the unpaid principal balance on all closed-end subordinate financing and the full amount of any HELOCs (whether or not funds have been drawn).
If both ITIN and NPRA, apply only the ITIN LLPA.
Elite_Non_QM_1_LLPAs: CLTV should be calculated using the unpaid principal balance on all closed-end subordinate financing and the full amount of any HELOCs (whether or not funds have been drawn).
Core_Conv_LLPAs: FTHB with AMI at or below 100% or 120% in designated High Cost Areas
Duty to Serve loans for Manufactured Housing and High Needs Rural Areas
Non Cashout Refinance - FICO/LTV LLPAs (Mortgage > 15 Year Terms)
Cashout Refinance - FICO/LTV LLPAs (All Mortgage Terms)
Non Cashout Refinance - LLPAs by Product Feature
Cashout Refinance - LLPAs by Product Feature
LLPAs by Product Feature for All Eligible Loans(5)
AK, CT, DC, GA, KS, LA, ND, SD, VT Additional
(1) Also applies to loans in which all borrowers have nontraditional credit.
(2) Not applicable to detached condominiums (identified by SFC 588)
(3) If the subordinate financing is a Community Seconds / Affordable Second loan, these LLPAs do not apply
(4) Not applicable to MH Advantage and ChoiceHome Properties
(5) Not subject to Cumulative LLPA Cap
(6) Applies to purchase primary residence transactions
(7) Fee will only be billed if the loan is not delivered.  Delegated Only.
(8) Applies to Fixed rate transactions with terms > = 300 months, loan balances > 225,000, and FICO > = 680. NY state standard balance not eligible. NY high balance <= 70% LTV not eligible.
Core_FHA_LLPAs: FHA Full Doc Manual U/W FICO >= 640
FHA Full Doc Manual U/W FICO < 640
AK, CA, CO, DC, FL, ME, NV, UT, WY Additional
(1) The Govt LTV adjustments are based off of Total Loan LTV.
(2) The loan amount/balance adjustments are based off of Total Loan Amount.
(3) Fee will only be billed if the loan is not delivered.  Delegated Only.
Core_VA_LLPAs: Loan Size Adjustments all Products (Excluding Hi Bal Products)
Core_Non_QM: *Escrow Waiver LLPA will only be applied if taxes are not being escrowed
For DSCR Plus, Detached Condos are treated as Single Family Residence
